title: T-Ratios of Multiple & sub multiple angles

concepts.title: Trigonometric ratios of multiple angles
concepts.conceptBody:
Trigonometric Ratio of multiple angles 

$\sin 2A=2\sin A\cos A$

$\begin{align} & \cos 2A={{\cos }^{2}}A-{{\sin }^{2}}A \\ & \,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,=2{{\cos }^{2}}A-1 \\ & \,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,=1-2{{\sin }^{2}}A \\ \end{align}$

$\tan \,2A=\frac{2\tan A}{1-{{\tan }^{2}}A}$

$\sin \,3A=2\sin A-4{{\sin }^{3}}A$

$\cos 3A=4{{\cos }^{3}}A-3\cos A$

$\text{tan}\,\text{3A}=\frac{3\text{tanA}\,\text{-}\,\text{ta}{{\text{n}}^{3}}A}{1-3\text{ta}{{\text{n}}^{2}}\text{A}}$

concepts.title: mixed properties
concepts.conceptBody:
Important deductions and formulas

Sometimes even after remembering all these above formulas we are not able to recognize

them in questions. So look into these formulas also

Conversion of squares & cubes into multiple angles :

  • $\text{si}{{\text{n}}^{2}}\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ A}=\frac{1}{2}\left( 1-\text{cos}2\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ A} \right)$
  • ${{\cos }^{2}}\text{A}=\frac{1}{2}\left( 1+\text{cos}2\text{A} \right)$
  • $\text{si}{{\text{n}}^{3}}\text{A}=\frac{1}{4}\left( 3\sin A-\sin 3\text{A} \right)$
  • ${{\cos }^{3}}\text{A}=\frac{1}{4}\left( \cos 3A-3\text{cosA} \right)$

Other formulas 

$\begin{array}{*{35}{r}} {} & \text{sin}A=\frac{2\text{tan}A/2}{1+\text{ta}{{\text{n}}^{2}}A/2} \\ {} & \text{cos}A=\frac{1-\text{ta}{{\text{n}}^{2}}A/2}{1+\text{ta}{{\text{n}}^{2}}A/2} \\ \end{array}$
